fixes_applied.change: #boot-screen: position:absolute -> position:fixed, top:0 left:0 width:100vw height:100vh, z-index:200 -> 9999, background:#0a0a12 -> #000, added overflow:hidden
fixes_applied.result: Boot screen now covers full viewport including sides. No 3D bleed-through possible. Black background ensures true black border on all sides.

fixes_applied.change: Removed createDollyPath() (CatmullRomCurve3). Removed dollyActive/dollyProgress/dollyCallback/DOLLY_DURATION state. Camera fixed at (0,12,35) lookAt (0,5,-20). startDolly() is now no-op calling onComplete immediately. 0.4s button delay removed.
fixes_applied.result: Camera fully static. Button visible immediately on menu load. World animates (waves, sky, spray, cliff light flicker). No rotation or orbit.

fixes_applied.change: Removed import of initMerlinLair. Removed entire runMerlinLair() async function. Removed await runMerlinLair() from main(). Flow: runBootScreen -> runMainMenu -> game.
fixes_applied.result: No lair hub between menu and game. Clean direct flow after button click.

regression_gate.bundle_note: Decreased vs cycle 22 (123KB) — MerlinLairScene no longer imported
